name: Slipped on subcontractor's mess at work in Boise, sue them?
description: Yes, file third-party suit for extra damages.

mainEntity.name: Slipped on subcontractor's mess at work in Boise, sue them?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, file third-party suit for extra damages.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, third-party claim alongside workers' comp.** Idaho allows if not employer.[1][5] Key factors: Prove their negligence. 2-year limit. Bigger payouts for pain/suffering. Coordinate claims. Attorney pursues max recovery.
